entries.summary: Executed comprehensive QA test suite validating all frontend UX improvements across unit tests, integration tests, format/lint checks, and multi-viewport responsive testing. All 554 frontend tests passed, all backend tests passed, production build successful, and mobile layouts verified at 375px, 768px, and 1024px viewports.

integrations.description: Comprehensive test suite validation covering all frontend UX improvements including 2-phase workflow, unified form modal, enhanced cards, clickable phase navigation, and route restructuring
integrations.backendEndpoint: All backend endpoints validated via unit tests
integrations.dataFlow: Unit tests → Integration tests → Format/Lint → Production build → Responsive layout validation (375px, 768px, 1024px) → Console error check → Deployment readiness confirmed

entries.summary: Updated all component and hook tests to cover new 2-phase workflow functionality including removal of UPLOAD phase tests, comprehensive DraftClaimCard tests with expansion and edit functionality, and enhanced ClaimFormModal tests covering both create and edit modes. All 554 tests now passing with proper coverage.
Deleted BulkUploadClaimCard component and all references, fixed remaining UPLOAD phase references in page.tsx

components.name: BulkUploadClaimCard
components.purpose: DELETED - Card component for bulk upload workflow, functionality moved to DraftClaimCard

components.name: BulkFileUploadComponent
components.purpose: DEPRECATED - Marked as deprecated with @deprecated JSDoc tag, kept for reference only

entries.summary: Restructured application routes: moved multi-claim submission page from /new to / (root), moved claims list page from / to /claims, and deleted /new directory. Updated navigation to point Submit Claims button to root path. Updated URL documentation comments in both pages.

integrations.description: Route restructuring following Next.js App Router file-based routing. Multi-claim submission now at root (/) for primary workflow entry point, claims list moved to /claims for secondary list view. Navigation updated in claims page to point Submit Claims button to root path.
integrations.dataFlow: User visits / → Multi-claim submission page | User visits /claims → Claims list page → Submit Claims button → Navigate to / | /new route → 404 (intentional)

entries.summary: Restructured page rendering to merge Phase 1 and 2 into unified 2-phase workflow (CREATION → REVIEW). Removed UPLOAD phase conditional block, BulkFileUploadComponent import, and related handlers. Updated navigation buttons and ClaimReviewComponent to flow directly from CREATION to REVIEW phase.

functions.name: handleMoveToReview
functions.purpose: Validates claim count and navigates to REVIEW phase (retained from previous implementation)

functions.name: handleEditClaim
functions.purpose: Opens edit modal for claim modification (retained, unchanged)

integrations.description: Simplified phase flow from 3-phase to 2-phase workflow. CREATION phase now flows directly to REVIEW phase without intermediate UPLOAD phase. Navigation buttons updated to skip UPLOAD and go directly from CREATION to REVIEW.
integrations.dataFlow: CREATION phase → User clicks 'Review & Submit' → handleMoveToReview validates → moveToReviewPhase() → REVIEW phase → User clicks 'Back' → resetToCreationPhase() → CREATION phase

entries.summary: Implemented clickable phase navigation with validation for CREATION and REVIEW phases. Added handlePhaseClick function with no-op checks and claim count validation. Desktop and mobile phase indicators now support click navigation with cursor-pointer styling.

functions.name: handlePhaseClick
functions.purpose: Handles phase navigation clicks with validation to prevent invalid transitions and provide user feedback

integrations.description: Phase indicators (desktop and mobile) now trigger phase navigation via handlePhaseClick, which validates claim count and calls existing phase transition functions
integrations.dataFlow: User clicks phase indicator → handlePhaseClick validates → No-op if same phase → Validates claimsCount > 0 for REVIEW → Calls resetToCreationPhase() or moveToReviewPhase() → UI updates

entries.summary: Verified DraftClaimsList handleEditClaim implementation. Function already correctly calls onEditClaim(claim) callback when prop exists (lines 65-72). No toast placeholders present. Implementation meets REQ-004 requirements without modifications.

functions.name: handleEditClaim
functions.purpose: Event handler that delegates claim editing to parent component via onEditClaim callback prop

integrations.description: DraftClaimsList receives onEditClaim callback from parent page component. When user clicks Edit on DraftClaimCard, handleEditClaim invokes onEditClaim(claim), triggering edit modal in parent.
integrations.dataFlow: User clicks Edit on DraftClaimCard → DraftClaimCard calls onEdit(claim) prop → handleEditClaim invoked → onEditClaim(claim) callback fires → Parent component (new/page.tsx) opens ClaimFormModal with initialValues

entries.summary: Enhanced DraftClaimCard with collapsible file upload section and functional edit button. Added expansion state with defaultExpanded prop, ChevronUp/ChevronDown toggle icons, and conditional FileUploadComponent rendering with border-top separator.

components.name: DraftClaimCard (Enhanced)
components.purpose: Draft claim card with collapsible file upload section, supporting inline file management without navigation
components.props: { claim: IClaimMetadata, onEdit: (claim) => void, onDelete: (claim) => void, isDeleting?: boolean, defaultExpanded?: boolean, className?: string }

integrations.description: DraftClaimCard integrates FileUploadComponent for inline file management. Expansion state controls visibility of file upload section, allowing users to add/remove attachments without leaving the creation phase.
integrations.dataFlow: User clicks expand button → isExpanded state toggles → FileUploadComponent conditionally renders → File uploads handled by FileUploadComponent's useFileUpload hook → Attachments update in claim.attachments array → UI refreshes

entries.summary: Updated new/page.tsx to use ClaimFormModal with modal state management for both create and edit modes following REQ-004. Added isCreateModalOpen and editingClaim state, replaced inline form with "Add Claim" button, and added two modal instances (create + edit).

components.name: ClaimFormModal (Create Instance)
components.purpose: Modal dialog for creating new draft claims, triggered by 'Add Claim' button
components.props: { isOpen: boolean, onClose: () => void, onClaimCreated: (claim) => void, existingDraftClaims: IClaimMetadata[] }

components.name: ClaimFormModal (Edit Instance)
components.purpose: Modal dialog for editing existing draft claims with pre-filled form values
components.props: { isOpen: boolean, onClose: () => void, onClaimCreated: (claim) => void, existingDraftClaims: IClaimMetadata[], initialValues: Partial<IClaimMetadata> | undefined }

functions.name: handleEditClaim
functions.purpose: Opens edit modal by setting editingClaim state with the claim to edit

integrations.description: Page component manages modal visibility state and connects user actions to ClaimFormModal instances
integrations.dataFlow: User clicks 'Add Claim' button → isCreateModalOpen set to true → Create modal opens. User clicks Edit on DraftClaimCard → handleEditClaim sets editingClaim → Edit modal opens with pre-filled form. On form submit → handleClaimCreated called → modal closes → state resets.

entries.summary: Converted MultiClaimForm to ClaimFormModal with Dialog wrapper supporting both create and edit modes. Added isOpen/onClose props for modal control and initialValues prop for pre-filling form fields in edit mode. Renamed file and updated all imports across the codebase.

components.name: Dialog
components.purpose: Shadcn/ui Dialog component family for modal dialogs with overlay, content, header, footer, title, and description subcomponents
components.props: DialogContent: className, children; DialogTitle: className, children; DialogDescription: className, children

components.name: ClaimFormModal
components.purpose: Unified modal form component for creating new claims and editing existing draft claims with validation and pre-filled values
components.props: isOpen: boolean, onClose: () => void, onClaimCreated?: (claim: IClaimMetadata) => void, existingDraftClaims?: IClaimMetadata[], initialValues?: Partial<IClaimMetadata>

integrations.description: ClaimFormModal wraps existing form logic in Dialog component, detecting edit mode via initialValues.id and displaying contextual title/description. Modal closes automatically after successful submission.
integrations.dataFlow: isOpen prop controls Dialog visibility → initialValues pre-fills form via useEffect → useMultiClaimForm handles validation → onClaimCreated callback closes modal → onClose handles Dialog dismissal

entries.summary: Updated useMultiClaim hook to 2-phase workflow by removing UPLOAD phase from MultiClaimPhase enum and deleting moveToUploadPhase function. Maintains all existing mutation hooks and React Query patterns.

functions.name: moveToReviewPhase
functions.purpose: Transition workflow to REVIEW phase for final claim validation

functions.name: resetToCreationPhase
functions.purpose: Reset workflow to CREATION phase and clear upload progress

integrations.description: Simplified multi-claim workflow from 3 phases (CREATION → UPLOAD → REVIEW) to 2 phases (CREATION → REVIEW), allowing direct transition between creation and review phases
integrations.dataFlow: MultiClaimPhase enum defines valid states → Phase transition functions manage state → Components consume currentPhase from hook state
